problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
hypothesis: If Telomerase activation/inhibition in target cells is applied to spread, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
